# color / table

The **color** type's `data-view.cell` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Cell({ match: "color", ... })` — a read-only
`ColorCell` that renders a small swatch tinted with the projected CSS color
alongside the raw color string.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Color field type: data-view table cell (read-only color swatch).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Cell` "color" → `ColorCell`
  - Uses: `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`
